channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: VIDEO: Police arrest ‘one chance’ kidnapping syndicate, recover N8.8m ransom in Abuja
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Abuja police dismantle a ‘one chance’ kidnapping syndicate, recovering N8.8m ransom. Learn how the FCT command tracked and arrested the suspects.
Read More: https://punchng.com/video-police-arrest-one-chance-kidnapping-syndicate-recover-n8-8m-ransom-in-abuja/

item.title: Woman gives birth while asleep, finds newborn under blanket
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
A Canadian mother shares her traumatic experience of giving birth while asleep and finding her newborn son under the blanket, sparking online discussion.
Read More: https://punchng.com/woman-gives-birth-while-asleep-finds-newborn-under-blanket/

item.title: IMF lowers 2026 world growth forecast as Middle East risks linger
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The IMF has cut its 2026 world growth forecast to 3.0% due to lingering Middle East risks, despite an AI boom. Global inflation is also set to accelerate.
Read More: https://punchng.com/imf-lowers-2026-world-growth-forecast-as-middle-east-risks-linger/

item.title: Dangote refinery begins free petrol delivery to Abuja, five states
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Dangote Refinery begins free petrol delivery to Abuja, Lagos, and five other states for bulk purchases, maintaining its N1,075/litre ex-depot price.
Read More: https://punchng.com/dangote-refinery-begins-free-petrol-delivery-to-abuja-five-states/

item.title: Emotional moment Jai Arrow carries out Shield for State of Origin game
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Former South Sydney Rabbitohs and Queensland player Jai Arrow, who announced his retirement earlier this year after being diagnosed with Motor Neurone Disease (MND), carries out the State of Origin shield.

item.title: Does ‘frustrated’ Verstappen have anywhere to go from Red Bull?
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: An extremely frustrating British Grand Prix weekend for Max Verstappen has done little to calm speculation around the four-time world champion making a potential exit from Red Bull at the end of the season.

item.title: Nigeria's president demands to know how fake agency was allegedly set up in his office
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: Adeniyi Adeyemi allegedly forged a letter of appointment and secured funding for an agency the presidency knew nothing about.

item.title: I’m wicked – Brymo opens up on affairs with married women
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: He explained that some of the women he shared intimacy with would lie about being separated from their husbands.

item.title: Yardeni Says Inflation, Fed Back in Play as Iran Crisis Returns
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Market strategist Ed Yardeni said the rupture in the ceasefire between the US and Iran risks sparking a fresh acceleration in price growth, which in turn could compel the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates.

item.title: Argentina’s Winning Goal Against Egypt Should’ve Been Disallowed, Says Ian Wright
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: Former England striker Ian Wright has claimed Argentina’s late winning goal against Egypt in the Round of 16 of the 2026 FIFA World Cup should have been disallowed. He argued that Mohamed Salah was fouled in the build-up. Wright made the remarks while analysing Argentina’s dramatic 3-2 c

item.title: Palace latest: Japan star Kamada pens new deal
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football

item.title: Sokoto govt launches bidding process for major school infrastructure projects
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The Sokoto State Government, through the Adolescent Girls Initiative for Learning and Empowerment (AGILE) Project, has commenced... The post Sokoto govt launches bidding process for major school infrastructure projects appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: Bitcoin and ethereum prices today, Wednesday, July 8, 2026: Crypto prices down following U.S.-Iran strikes
item.dc:creator: Yahoo Finance

item.title: 'In Waves': A luminous, moving love story on the waves
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: Manon Kerjean explains why the animated feature In Waves, Phuong Mai Nguyen's adaptation of a bestselling graphic novel, has been moving audiences to tears. We also take a look at Stéphane Demoustier's dark summertime thriller The Heat and enjoy the behind-the-scenes comedy of La Comédie Française,

item.title: Iran war will leave an inflation scar on the U.S. through 2027, IMF says
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: The conflict with Iran hasn’t hurt the U.S. and global economies as much as expected, but it will leave a lasting legacy: Another bout of high inflation that won’t disappear quickly.

item.title: Just In: Reps Clash Over Motion Seeking To Summon Tinubu
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: A motion proposing that President Bola Tinubu be invited to appear before the House of Representatives sparked heated exchanges on Wednesday, disrupting plenary proceedings. The controversy began when Benedict Etanabene, the lawmaker representing Okpe/Sapele/Uvwie Federal Constituency of Delta State

item.title: Dangote Refinery announces free petrol delivery to five states at price near N1,000/litre
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Dangote Refinery has announced free premium motor spirit delivery to five states, including Nigeria, including the Federal Capital Territory, Abuja, at N1,075 per litre price.  The mega refinery disclosed this in a notice on X on Wednesday.  According to Dangote Refinery, its free pet
